rag_rules: Insert AGREE annexes only into implementation scopes when binding implementation-level signal routing, not component types.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure: only reference subcomponents and connections explicitly declared in the input model.
Scope boundaries must align: implementation-level bindings require implementation-level annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and placed within valid component implementation blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) or event ports as numeric/Boolean values in AGREE expressions.
Do not assume port names from requirements are directly usable without validation against the AADL model structure.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
